stampDuty.description: Stamp Duty Act (Cap 480), updated per Finance Act 2023 for AHF exemption

notes: Stamp duty is payable within 30 days of execution of the transfer instrument
First-time buyers under the Affordable Housing Fund (AHF) scheme are exempt from stamp duty
LSK conveyancing fees are calculated on a progressive scale similar to tax bands
Land rent and rates clearance are additional county-specific costs for leasehold properties
